privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for erpnext_env drop_shipping_workflow_execution task by confirming that the prerequisite Customer ('Apex Corp'), Supplier ('Global Solar Supply'), and Item ('Industrial Solar Inverter') are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via setup_task.sh using the ERPNext API. Verified that the expected quantity (10), sales rate (1500.00), and purchase rate (1000.00) explicitly match the task description instructions. Furthermore, discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, meaning the task's success logic (verifier.py::verify_drop_shipping_workflow) will perpetually fail and render the task unscorable.
